title: Simulation: Monthly Allowance
perfectScoreMsg: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} scenarios correct! You're mastering the art of balanced budgeting!
lessonLabel: Lesson: A balanced budget prioritizes needs (food, transport) while saving for the future and allowing some fun!
lowScoreMsg: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} scenarios correct. Remember the balanced budget formula: 40% food, 30% transport, 20% savings, 10% fun!
tipLabel: Tip: Allocate money to cover essential needs first, then save, and finally allow some fun money.

scenarios.title: Monthly Allowance Choices
scenarios.description: You get ₹1000 as allowance. How can you use it wisely?

options.text: Set aside for essentials, fun, and saving
Keep all cash hidden at home

scenarios.title: Part-time Job Earnings
scenarios.description: You earn ₹1500 from a weekend job. What's a smart approach?

options.text: Divide for goals, needs, and fun
Spend only on gadgets or clothes

scenarios.title: Scholarship Bonus
scenarios.description: You receive ₹2000 scholarship. What’s the smartest way to use it?

options.text: Buy books, courses, or tools for learning

scenarios.title: Birthday Gift Money
scenarios.description: You get ₹800 as birthday money. What's a thoughtful choice?

options.text: Save for a bigger goal or need

scenarios.title: Summer Job Windfall
scenarios.description: You earn ₹2500 from a summer job. How to maximize benefits?

options.text: Split for saving, learning, and small treats
Rush to pay debts you don’t fully understand
